body:
| | | In less than 48 hours, the August 28th primary election will be here! Friend, In less than 48 hours, the August 28th primary election will be here! To me, the Second Amendment is second nature. As your Representative, I’ll always protect and defend the Second Amendment of the U.S. Constitution and will never cast a vote or take action that in any way infringes upon our right to bear arms. **Help me protect our 2nd amendment by voting SHEDD on Tuesday, August 28th.** [Please find your polling place now,](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nhuidz-jriylrtihd-y/) and get ready to go! Polls open at 6 a.m. and close at 7 p.m. Thank you, Tiffany PS: [Forward these email to 5 of your friends now](http://tiffanyshedd.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-jriylrtihd-7AA0AE98-nhuidz-l-d) to help us #DefendTheWest!

# _President Trump Says Mexico Trade Deal Near; NAFTA Hurdles Seen Easing_
President Donald Trump said on Saturday that the United States could reach a ‘big Trade Agreement’ with Mexico soon,” David Lawder and Sharay Angulo report for _Reuters._ “The U.S.-Mexico talks for weeks focused on crafting new rules for the automotive industry, which Trump has put at the center of his drive to rework the 24-year-old deal.” President Trump tweeted on Saturday that the U.S. “relationship with Mexico is getting closer by the hour.” The White House will make an announcement regarding trade at 11 a.m. ET this morning. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.reuters.com/article/us-trade-nafta-trump/trump-says-mexico-trade-deal-near-nafta-hurdles-seen-easing-idUSKCN1LA0H0) ** “Last week's announcement from the Trump administration, on the EPA’s new Affordable Clean Energy Plan to replace the Clean Power Plan, is another welcome addition to President Trump’s list of promises fulfilled that benefit American workers,” Rep. Steve Scalise (R-LA) writes in the **_[Washington Examiner](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/op-eds/rep-steve-scalise-trump-ends-obamas-war-on-coal)._** “In just the two years working with Trump, we have been able to end the war on American energy.” In the **_[New York Post](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://nypost.com/2018/08/26/the-long-road-to-nazi-labor-camp-guard-jakiw-palijs-removal/),_** Brian Allen Benczkowski writes that “the removal to Germany last week of Jakiw Palij, a longtime Queens resident and former Nazi SS labor-camp guard, is a triumph of justice and accountability for the victims of Nazi atrocities.” The Trump Administration ignored the tough odds and “commenced intense discussions with the German government to secure Palij’s readmission.” “For more than a half-century, a majority of the U.S. Supreme Court has rewritten the Constitution under the guise of interpreting it,” Rep. Tom Marino (R-PA) writes in the **_[Williamsport Sun-Gazette](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.sungazette.com/opinion/other-commentaries/2018/08/the-case-for-brett-kavanaugh/)._** Judge Brett Kavanaugh is “is an independent judge and the judge we need to fill this critical opening on the high court.” “ICE has become unjustly demonized in highly partisan politics,” Los Alamitos, California, Mayor Troy Edgar writes in the [**_Orange County Register_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.ocregister.com/2018/08/26/california-cities-support-ice-to-maintain-law-and-order/). “ICE has consistently prioritized and apprehended unlawfully present aliens within cities that have been arrested for committing a crime . . . Law and order is not a partisan issue.” “President Trump’s ‘Space Force’ proposal would help prevent the U.S. energy grid from going dark in an emergency or an attack, NASA Administrator Jim Bridenstine said in an exclusive interview with the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/energy/nasa-space-force-needed-to-protect-energy-grid-from-existential-threat),” John Siciliano reports. “Bridenstine argued that a disruption of America’s satellite assets would pose an ‘existential threat’ to the grid, meaning that a Space Force is needed more than ever.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTEwODExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDExMDgxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3NjUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: They’re hard at work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- Last week, I stopped by the Lebanon office in Wilson County for an impromptu visit to thank our volunteers. name: Jeremy Ring
subject: An important role, in an important year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F22DExvre-KfS3uRUYXm1QQXOFF752sWK0Ii6IrRO9M=/k5FQ94DEV9fdTRWkUk6ILmg25YcuG-rc36lW26O4H9s=) Friends and Neighbors -- The office of Florida Chief Financial Officer (CFO) requires the holder to wear a lot of hats - all at the same time. The role may not make many headlines, but the great responsibilities that come with it are consequential to _EVERY_ Floridian. To give you a better idea of all that the role of CFO entails, here is just a sampling of some of the things they do - and are in charge of: \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal. And in addition to all of this, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following role in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/F22DExvre-KfS3uRUYXm1QQXOFF752sWK0Ii6IrRO9M=/APQp0UWniGqxaJRRofqMA75eCR7CdlfaZqnoIg3_VZU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Needless to say, the CFO has a lot to do with the direction our state government takes. They also serve as **an important check and balance to other parts of the Cabinet - including the Governor 's office, as well as the state government's interaction with the federal governmen**t. These days, just watching the news should remind us of the great importance of checks and balances in government - and making sure our leaders are doing right by the people they were elected to serve _(you)._ We have an important opportunity this election year. As your next CFO, **I would be that check and balance in the Cabinet, making sure that your state government spends _YOUR_ money wisely and transparently.** But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help****.** **We have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more by midnight Saturday, to help me bring checks and balances to the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/F22DExvre-KfS3uRUYXm1QQXOFF752sWK0Ii6IrRO9M=/APQp0UWniGqxaJRRofqMA75eCR7CdlfaZqnoIg3_VZU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec5/4078506312/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friends, This weekend, Stacey Abrams shared her story - and at our statewide convention, Georgia Democrats from all 159 counties and all walks of life shared theirs: [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsE/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" I am more hopeful and optimistic because of Stacey Abrams, how she won the primary election, and what #TeamAbrams is building for November. Stacey is bold on the rights of workers, immigrants, women, and the disabled - communities and issues other candidates shy away from. Real change is finally within our reach!"_
\- Susana, Fulton County [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsF/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" In our thriving Georgia - with Governor Abrams - the roads are paved, the potholes are fixed, and the guy who cuts the grass on the state highway is actually doing a good job because he gets paid well. Everyone can get a good education and access health care. We were lucky because our children had military scholarships, but so many children aren't as fortunate - especially in our rural community."_
\- Connie and James, Murray County [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" Georgia thrives when there is equal opportunity for everyone to be the best version of themselves that they can possibly be. That's what Leader Abrams fight for, and THAT'S when our state will thrive!"_
\- Anthony, Bartow County [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsD/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" I support Stacey Abrams because she plans to expand access to need-based financial aid. I know Georgia will thrive under her leadership!"_
\- Rachel, Georgia Young Democrats [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsA/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" I believe Stacey Abrams is the best person to lead Georgia forward because she's got great ideas and she's dynamic. She sees the full picture on issues and she's willing to talk to anybody to get the job done."_
\- Chris, Clarke County [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec2/4078506312/VEsB/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2") _" Our next governor should move Georgia beyond equality and toward equity--where everyone has the opportunity and resources to thrive. We need opportunity for all, and nobody blocking that opportunity. Stacey gets that."_
\- Anissa, Macon-Bibb County No matter who they are or where they're from, Georgians are counting on us to win - to build a state where quality health care, excellent public schools, and good jobs are all within reach. Although they may share our vision, thousands of Georgia families haven't heard about our people-powered campaign yet. That's where you come in. Behind every door is a Georgian who wants more for their family, their communities, and themselves. On the other end of every phone call are folks who are itching for change but aren't sure how to make it real. **[Help us give EVERY voter a reason to vote in November: Sign up for a volunteer shift with #TeamAbrams today.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec3/4078506312/VEsO/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2/")** Every conversation with a voter puts us one step closer to victory on Election Day - and we're not kidding when we say electing Stacey Abrams won't be possible without your help. **Find a volunteer event in your area and sign up for a shift today. Together, we will write the next chapter of Georgia's story:** **[https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2/](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa988/34a064cc/d45a057/70edec3/4078506312/VEsP/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2/")** Let's do this! \- Team Abrams

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Stronger communities are safer communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This goes beyond law enforcement.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b2c8/7ab0e2c4/7fd1e386/349b5060/2837045641/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-communities?source=OHQ08278A") Friend, My grandfather set a strong example for me as a child about what it means to put your community, your city, and your state first. He would tell all the kids in his neighborhood, "If you're having a bad day, if you get into trouble, I get off of work at 6 pm. Come see me. I'm always available." As someone in law enforcement, his job to be a role model and keep people safe didn't have work hours. He constantly served the public. That's why I'm running -- because I know that the burden falls directly on police if we don't fully fund our schools, fix our broken healthcare system, grow an inclusive economy, and work towards the day when every neighborhood is a safe place to live. That's unacceptable. That is the message I delivered at the 26th State Biennial Fraternal Order of Police Conference a week ago, and it's the foundation of this campaign. [**If you believe that stronger communities build stronger law enforcement, add your name next to mine today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b2c8/7ab0e2c4/7fd1e386/349b5060/2837045641/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-communities?source=OHQ08278A") We have to stop depending on law enforcement to clean up the problems our lack of investment creates. Because it's fundamentally unfair for us to ask officers' families to worry about whether they're going to come home at night just because we lacked the courage to be real problem solvers, and settled instead for half-solutions. Courage today saves lives tomorrow. And my campaign is a rejection of the political cowardice that puts law enforcement in danger of even greater harm. We can't ignore that under Governor Larry Hogan, all violent crimes in Maryland have gone up 10%, and homicides are up nearly 50%. That's because of Governor Hogan's failure to invest in the basic needs of working families, which puts officers and communities at greater risk. Because at the end of the day, no matter what we do, we all have families we go home to -- we all need the same things. We want our kids to have fully funded schools that give them an equal opportunity at success. We want affordable access to high-quality healthcare. We want job security and a professional salary for a hard day's work. We want retirement security so we can live out the best days ahead. And yes, we want safe neighborhoods to live and work in. **I believe our best days are ahead of us -- if we start investing smart, and investing where it matters. I have to know you're with me, so don't wait:** [**Add your name next to mine if you believe that stronger communities are built from better investments in law enforcement and working families.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b2c8/7ab0e2c4/7fd1e386/349b5060/2837045641/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-communities?source=OHQ08278A") Thanks, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b2c8/7ab0e2c4/7fd1e386/349b5063/2837045641/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ08278A")

Because at the end of the day, no matter what we do, we all have families we go home to -- we all need the same things. We want our kids to have fully funded schools that give them an equal opportunity at success. We want affordable access to high-quality healthcare. We want job security and a professional salary for a hard day's work. We want retirement security so we can live out the best days ahead. And yes, we want safe neighborhoods to live and work in. I believe our best days are ahead of us -- if we start investing smart, and investing where it matters. I have to know you're with me, so don't wait: "" Thanks, Ben | "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Will you make a contribution to a leader committed to ending gun violence?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We need people like Tina willing to take on the corporate gun lobby.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4afdf/c1f7015/6a2bee8d/1141c058/788342968/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_giffords?refcode=rtw_20180827&recurring=auto") Friends, Across the country there is amazing energy to take on gun violence -- but this November will be a defining moment for our movement. **Control of the Senate and Congress is at stake -- and we must elect leaders who will take on the NRA and the corporate gun lobby. This is the only way to break the hold they have on our politics and the cycle of violence in our communities.** Tina Smith is one of these leaders we need in the Senate. She's taking on these special interests to expand background checks and ban the sale of bump stocks, assault weapons, and high-capacity magazines. That's why I'm asking: **[Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to Tina Smith's campaign before her August deadline? Gabby Giffords

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 'NO' on Brett Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Since President Trump announced Judge Brett Kavanaugh as his pick for the Supreme Court, I've been reviewing his background. After careful consideration of his past work, meeting with him personally, and listening to the concerns of Ohio families, **I've concluded I cannot support Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation.** [**If you oppose Kavanaugh, add your voice to mine. Sign your name now >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff3e/4462dc26/6184ec39/20072388/2036579241/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180827b") The Supreme Court handles some of the most important and sensitive issues in this country. The next Court could make decisions regarding protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions; _Roe vs. Wade_ ; employee rights; workplace discrimination; and so much more. Kavanaugh has repeatedly ruled against workers in cases involving safety and discrimination. He's undermined the Affordable Care Act. He's ruled against the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, putting consumers at risk. Special interests already have an army of lobbyists pushing their agenda in Washington. They do not need a voice on the Supreme Court. The American people need a justice who will look out for their rights. [**I will not support Kavanaugh's confirmation. Add your name to join me in my opposition.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff3e/4462dc26/6184ec39/20072388/2036579241/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180827b") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Bob
subject: attacks incoming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e630e/51dbcc2a/1e749e4a/3a9cac3/3028626027/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Important update for you:

I just checked in with my campaign manager, and she told me that we are still $12,800 short of where we need to be to meet our August fundraising goal. If we fall short this month, our advertising budget will be on the chopping block.

That just can't happen, team, because ever since I took a stand against the President's corrupt bargain with corporate special interests over this Supreme Court nomination, major Republican spenders have really stepped up their attacks against me. I sided with working families, not corporations or billionaires, and the president, the Koch brothers and Mitch McConnell aren't happy about that.

You've probably already heard that Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, so we need to close our $12,800 budget gap and make sure we have the resources we need to fight back.

Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take it a step further and make your first donation before midnight tonight -- just $5 will help keep this race competitive.

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/August-deadline](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180827_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

name: Team Mel
subject: Tell Rep. Walorski to schedule debates now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Mel believes that voters deserve to hear directly from their elected officials about where they stand on the issues that matter most to them.

That's why he asked our opponent, Rep. Walorski, for three public and televised debates back in July. Thanks in part to supporters like you who echoed our call, she agreed -- but now, her team is stalling. They have refused to even begin discussions until late September or early October.

subject: A great month for Team Banks!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, I wanted to take a moment to fill you in on all the exciting things our campaign has been up to!

Last Thursday, we had a great time at our 4th annual Wagyu BBQ. Thanks to all who came to support our campaign! We hope you enjoyed hearing from a true American hero and our friend Steve Scalise as much as we did.

**In other big news, our campaign was honored to receive three major endorsements this month!**

First, I was excited to receive the endorsement of the Farm Bureau ELECT PAC representing farmers across the Third District. Agriculture is very important to our district and I promise to continue to be a leader and voice for our district’s farmers in my second term. It was a huge honor to be endorsed by Indiana Right to Life for my strong pro-life voting record and defense of our conservative values. I will always be a proud pro-life voice for Hoosiers in Congress. Our campaign was also endorsed by the Indiana Chamber of Commerce for the work we’ve done this Congress to cut taxes, roll back regulations and overall grow the economy. I look forward to advocating for the same polices next Congress as well! We would love to have you get involved on our campaign by joining us at events, making phone calls, or knocking on doors. [Will you join Team Banks today to help us keep our momentum going through Election Day?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=5e3ae32985&e=bfe3be83a5)

Working for you,

Jim

body:
I wanted to update you on our goal.
#

Peter -
With Friday's official fundraising deadline quickly approaching, I wanted to update you on our goal.
We set our most ambitious goal to date: 4,156 contributions before the deadline (the same number our opponents had combined at the last deadline). As of today, **we need 3,541 more donations to hit our goal.**
That's good progress, but we need to push harder if we're going to stay on track to reach our goal. So I need to ask:
**[Can you make a $3 donation today? We've rejected all corporate money, so we're depending on supporters like you. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78093d/6e822e2f/1ab03ef0/41725500/877522210/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180827-full")**
We have incredible momentum right now. Our campaign is getting new endorsements every day, and our grassroots team is growing faster than ever. But this is going to be a close race. So we cannot let up now. We cannot get complacent.
We're in the home stretch, and if we all step up to do our part, then we will win this thing. I cannot do this alone, so thank you for your support.
Best,
Zephyr

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Today, another big promise kept
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 27, 2018
## Today, another big promise kept
##
**Announced this morning,** President Donald J. Trump is delivering on his promise to renegotiate the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) so all American workers can benefit. After years of promises by politicians, this is the first time that a modern American trade agreement has been renegotiated. **The 24-year-old NAFTA** was outdated and unbalanced, hurting American jobs and businesses as factories closed and jobs were exported. The old deal contributed to our ballooning annual goods trade deficit, which grew from $115 billion in 1993—the year before NAFTA’s implementation—to a staggering $800 billion in 2017. **The new U.S.–Mexico Trade Agreement** protects American workers, American manufacturing, and American agriculture. New “rules of origin” requirements will encourage billions a year in vehicle and automobile parts production in the United States, supporting high-wage jobs across the country. The deal will also include the strongest, fully enforceable labor standards of any trade agreement. **“Many people thought** that this was something that just couldn’t happen because of all of the different factions, all of the different sides, and the complexity,” President Trump said this morning. “And we made it much simpler, much better. Much better for both countries.” **[Get the facts: President Trump keeps his promise to renegotiate NAFTA.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTM5NjQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDEzOTY0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4MDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-keeping-promise-renegotiate-nafta/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **Watch** : [**President Trump calls Mexico’s President from the Oval Office.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTM5NjQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDEzOTY0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4MDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QXviH2LumcA)
# Two First Ladies, two campaigns for children
#
**President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** welcomed President Uhuru Kenyatta of the Republic of Kenya and First Lady Margaret Kenyatta to the White House today. **During President Trump’s bilateral meeting** with President Uhuru, Mrs. Trump and Mrs. Kenyatta discussed their respective initiatives on behalf of children: Mrs. Trump’s Be Best campaign and Mrs. Kenyatta’s Beyond Zero Initiative. **“The determination with which Kenya** strives to create better lives for its children is a shared compassion with the United States,” Mrs. Trump said. “I am very much looking forward to visiting Africa.” [**Watch President and Mrs. Trump host the President and First Lady of Kenya.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTM5NjQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDEzOTY0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4MDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://youtu.be/fDNjooehJyM) **More** : **[First Lady Melania Trump welcomes First Lady Margaret Kenyatta](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI3Ljk0MTM5NjQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNy45NDEzOTY0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4MDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/readout-first-lady-melania-trump-welcomes-first-lady-kenya-white-house/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **

clean_body: | | The White House • August 27, 2018 Today, another big promise kept Announced this morning, President Donald J. Trump is delivering on his promise to renegotiate the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) so all American workers can benefit. After years of promises by politicians, this is the first time that a modern American trade agreement has been renegotiated. The 24-year-old NAFTA was outdated and unbalanced, hurting American jobs and businesses as factories closed and jobs were exported. The old deal contributed to our ballooning annual goods trade deficit, which grew from $115 billion in 1993—the year before NAFTA’s implementation—to a staggering $800 billion in 2017. The new U.S.–Mexico Trade Agreement protects American workers, American manufacturing, and American agriculture. New “rules of origin” requirements will encourage billions a year in vehicle and automobile parts production in the United States, supporting high-wage jobs across the country. The deal will also include the strongest, fully enforceable labor standards of any trade agreement. “Many people thought that this was something that just couldn’t happen because of all of the different factions, all of the different sides, and the complexity,” President Trump said this morning. “And we made it much simpler, much better. Much better for both countries.” Watch : Two First Ladies, two campaigns for children President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump welcomed President Uhuru Kenyatta of the Republic of Kenya and First Lady Margaret Kenyatta to the White House today. During President Trump’s bilateral meeting with President Uhuru, Mrs. Trump and Mrs. Kenyatta discussed their respective initiatives on behalf of children: Mrs. Trump’s Be Best campaign and Mrs. Kenyatta’s Beyond Zero Initiative. “The determination with which Kenya strives to create better lives for its children is a shared compassion with the United States,” Mrs. Trump said. “I am very much looking forward to visiting Africa.” More : Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. Trump, speaking with President Enrique Peña Nieto of Mexico during a conference call, announces that the United States and Mexico have reached a trade agreement | August 24, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

body:
Hi -- I'll be up front with you. **[I'm writing to ask for a donation to our campaign.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=agtSbj39FNySq3iIXEKPZ8ETBUcMX%2F02)**
Here's why: Minnesotans want someone who will make a difference for them in Washington. They want someone who will be a check and balance on the President and who will prioritize the things that matter to them -- like health care, the environment, and security.
All of those things and many more are on the line this November. This could be the most important election of our lifetimes and what happens will determine the direction of our country.
So we have to win. And winning an election takes a lot of work, so I'm depending on this grassroots team.

subject: This will take you 14 minutes to read, but it’s incredibly important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to read our finalized plan to elect
Beto. On most campaigns, the full blueprint is a tightly-held secret
shared only with key staff. What we’re doing here is extremely unique.
We’re placing all our faith in the hands of volunteers like you.

It’ll take you about 14 minutes to read the whole briefing, but we want
you to read it all the way to the bottom. Executing a statewide voter
mobilization program on this scale has never been done before and it won’t
be easy, and it will only be possible if we all know the basics of the
plan by heart.

The last time a Democrat won statewide office in Texas was 24 years ago.
In a normal year, under normal circumstances, a normal Democratic
candidate doesn’t normally win. But this isn’t a normal year. And Beto’s
not a typical candidate.

We have the right person, the enthusiasm and the plan to win. But we can
only do it if you know exactly the role you’ll play.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6315?t=1001&akid=5573%2E444211%2EnZF5Rk ]Read our campaign “Plan to Win” now and be part of the team that makes
history by electing Beto to the U.S. Senate.

After you’ve finished reading our plan, we need you to share it with all
the Beto supporters you know.

We also need grassroots volunteers from across the nation to have the
backs of those working on a massive Get Out the Vote operation throughout
the state. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas/?source=ema20180827&t=1006&akid=5573%2E444211%2EnZF5Rk ]Sign up now if you’re interested in coming home to Texas to
lend a hand -- it’s a big commitment, but we have lots of work to do and
this is one of the best ways you can make a meaningful impact on this
election.

Some of you have been working for months, or even more than a year, to
elect Beto. Now, it all comes down to the final plan and the final months
of this election.

I don’t like to make predictions about what will happen on Election Day,
but I can say one thing for sure. There is no team I’d rather finish this
contest with -- from our dedicated volunteers to our incredible staff on
the ground.

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for making this campaign possible.

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I am not afraid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98f/34a064cc/d53b807/70edbd5/770524707/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friends, As I travel across Georgia to earn every vote, I am sometimes asked, _"What is your greatest fear in this election?"_ **I am not afraid.** My parents prepared me for this. They showed me how to hold my head high in the face of doubt. Through their example - as ordained ministers, as activists, and as community leaders - they taught my five siblings and me to speak out when we see a problem, then lead the charge to solve it. **I am not afraid because I believe in Georgia.** Our state isn't perfect, but our problems are solvable - and Georgians are ready and willing to tackle the challenges we face. **[But here's the thing: Changing the status quo in Georgia requires all of us. So many people are counting on us to make it happen. Please, chip in $3 to help our campaign transform the South.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98f/34a064cc/d53b807/70edbd2/770524707/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI3MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082718-full-link1")** What we are able to accomplish over the next **71 days** will give more families the chance to get ahead. And what we raise before the end of August will determine what our team can do in September - when voters begin casting mail-in ballots. **Georgians will begin voting in three weeks, but I am not afraid.** I am not afraid because you are with me. And although the road to Election Day will be tough, and although we have an extraordinary amount of work ahead of us, we know what we need to do. **We need to reach out to _every_ Georgian and give them a reason to vote. That's how we shattered expectations in our primary election - and with your help, we will do it again in November:** **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/Not-Afraid](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98f/34a064cc/d53b807/70edbd3/770524707/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI3MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082718-full-link2")** Let's get to work. \- Stacey Abrams

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you join the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Every day, I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a cage. And to me, it's much more than an accessory. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines in order to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. Years ago, I went to a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, and a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin. I've worn it ever since. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how important it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of those families. The canary pin is an important symbol for me -- and to this campaign. So today, we're announcing the Team Sherrod Canary Club. Our organization runs on one $26 average online contribution at a time. If you [**_match that by giving $26 today, you'll become a member of the Team Sherrod Canary Club._** ](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff3c/4462dc26/61a1767d/2007204b/1168653073/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180827ccnd?refcode=sbe180827ccnd_m&amount=26")We'll even send you a free bumper sticker as a thank you. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff3c/4462dc26/61a1767d/2007204b/1168653073/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180827ccnd?refcode=sbe180827ccnd_m&amount=26")
---
These next three months will not be easy. But as long as we face them together, we will come out ahead in November -- and we'll be able to continue fighting for hardworking families in Ohio and across the country.
With gratitude,
Sherrod
